overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a dark dirt trail at night in a survival video game. The player briefly raises a lit torch to illuminate the path before continuing through the grassy rural terrain, with the torch light casting warm orange illumination on the ground ahead.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along a dark dirt trail through open grassland at night. The path is barely visible in the low ambient light, with tall grass banks on both sides and a bare tree trunk visible in the distance to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural trail illuminated by handheld torch

events.description: player raises a lit torch into the left side of the frame, casting warm orange light on the path ahead

agents.ego_description: walking while holding a lit torch in the left hand to illuminate the dark trail ahead

entered.detail: wooden torch with bright flame held in the left hand, casting dynamic shadows
tall wooden utility pole with crossbar appearing alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The player raises a lit torch, dramatically improving visibility along the dirt trail. The torch illuminates the path with warm orange light as the player approaches and passes a wooden utility pole on the right side, while continuing to walk forward through the grassy terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail continuing into darkness

events.description: torch is lowered out of view, reducing illumination to the ground immediately ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the trail with the torch light now only illuminating the ground surface

entered.detail: distant trees silhouetted against the dark night sky on the left horizon
distant trees silhouetted against the dark night sky on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The torch is lowered out of view, leaving only the ground illuminated by the downward light. The player continues walking along the dirt path through open grassland, with scattered trees visible on the distant horizon against the night sky. The terrain remains consistent with tall grass banks flanking the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a first-person perspective moving along a dark rural trail that transitions from near-total obscurity to a brief moment of warm illumination. It begins with a walk through open grassland at night, where the dirt path and a distant bare tree trunk are barely visible in the low ambient light. As the player raises a lit torch, the scene shifts dramatically, casting a warm orange glow over the trail and a wooden utility pole on the right. The torch is then lowered out of view, narrowing the light to the ground immediately ahead as the camera continues forward. Finally, the view opens up to reveal scattered trees on the distant horizon against the night sky, while the path remains flanked by tall grass banks.
